payload.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Separate non-project reflection from Builder artifacts" in phase "Heartbeat Autonomy Foundation"?
groundedNodeLabels: Separate non-project reflection from Builder artifacts
Extend Victor from supervised phase-by-phase execution into sustainable governed heartbeat operation with explicit separation between project build progress and non-project self-reflection.
Teach heartbeat to select the next governed slice after phase closure
Heartbeat self-reflection can be written without attaching to a Builder phase or cluster.
The resulting architecture is ready for Victor-mediated automation under Builder Console governance.
Prepare unattended 30m heartbeat operation with safe stop conditions
Audit output is sufficient to explain unattended heartbeat behavior after the fact.
recommendedNextActions: Implement heartbeat self-reflection can be written without attaching to a Builder phase or cluster
